name: Illinois Calumet Corridor Demo
summary: Planner-facing demo site focused on redevelopment tradeoffs across a Chicago industrial corridor. Users choose one preconfigured parcel, enter a project brief, and compare the submitted plan against an auto-mitigated alternative.

areas.name: Calumet Industrial Strip
areas.planning_notes: Heavy industrial parcel near existing freight activity with elevated emissions and ecosystem stress.

areas.name: Arterial Infill Corridor
areas.planning_notes: Urban corridor where logistics demand, traffic growth, and neighborhood heat stress compete for limited right of way.

areas.name: River Buffer Redevelopment
areas.planning_notes: River-edge parcel suited for mixed-use redevelopment but sensitive to habitat disruption and loss of green buffers.
